ext.description: Rich GUI for Claude Code: context, cache, cost and account-limit transparency, inline diffs, plan mode and checkpoints — running through the Claude Code CLI.
view.cockpit.name: Cockpit
cfg.claudePath: Path to the Claude Code CLI executable.
cfg.language: UI language. 'auto' follows the VS Code language; falls back to English.
cfg.permissionMode: Default permission mode passed to the CLI. Reflected (pre-selected) in the Permission dropdown in the panel; change it there to override just the current session.
cfg.notifyOnComplete: Show a notification when Claude finishes a turn and the Cockpit panel is not visible.
cfg.showThinking: Expand Claude's thinking blocks by default in the chat.
cfg.expandToolCards: Expand tool call cards by default in the timeline.
cfg.userName: Name shown for your messages instead of 'You'. Empty = your OS username.
cfg.ffmpegPath: Path to the ffmpeg executable used for voice dictation capture. Empty = use 'ffmpeg' from PATH.
cfg.voiceLanguage: Language for voice dictation (speech-to-text). Empty = follow the Cockpit UI language.
cfg.voiceCorrect: After stopping dictation, send the text to Haiku for spelling/grammar correction. The correction is an isolated one-shot (no project context; its transcript is deleted).
cfg.model: Default model for new sessions. 'Account default' lets the CLI choose. This is reflected (pre-selected) in the Model dropdown in the panel; change it there to override just the current session.
cfg.effort: Default reasoning effort for new sessions. 'CLI default' uses your ~/.claude/settings.json effortLevel. Reflected (pre-selected) in the Effort dropdown in the panel; change it there to override just the current session.
cfg.apiKey: Optional Anthropic API key, used **only** to list available models via `/v1/models`. Leave empty if Claude Code is authenticated by subscription — the model selector falls back to aliases, the active model and a custom field. The key is not used for chat (that always goes through the CLI).
cfg.autoResumeLastSession: When opening a folder, automatically resume the most recent session for that folder (loads its history). Turn off to always start empty.
